# Egoi Tools

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî E-goi campaign-group search tool.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `egoi_campaign_group_search` | List E-goi campaign groups. Optional 'group_id' returns a single group; 'name' filters by substring (server-side). | `egoi:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_campaign_report` | Fetch the E-goi email-campaign report (overall totals + selectable breakdowns) with an optional Mermaid chart. | `egoi:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_campaign_search` | Search E-goi campaigns by channel, status, group, list and time range. Returns one row per campaign. | `egoi:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_contact_get` | Fetch a single E-goi contact by list_id + contact_id. Use egoi_contact_search first to locate the ids. | `egoi:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_contact_manage` | Bulk E-goi contact operations (delete, mass status change, tag, forget, JSON/CSV bulk import). Requires approval. | `egoi:write`, `egoi:delete` | ‚úì | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_contact_quick_action` | Quick low-risk E-goi contact actions (up to 10 ids per call). Use 'egoi_contact_manage' for delete, imports or larger batches. | `egoi:write` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_contact_search` | Search E-goi contacts. Use scope='global' to locate a contact by email across all lists, or scope='list' to enumerate contacts inside a specific list/segment. | `egoi:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_dashboard` | Aggregated E-goi dashboard with multiple views (overview, top_lists, recent_campaigns, delivery_funnel, engagement_trend). | `egoi:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_list_manage` | Manage E-goi mailing lists. Currently supports action='create'. | `egoi:write` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_list_search` | Search E-goi mailing lists. Returns one row per list with contact stats. Use this before any contact-level operation to discover the target ``list_id``. | `egoi:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `egoi_taxonomy_search` | List E-goi tags or segments. Use this before any tag/segment-filtered contact operation to discover ids and names. Set kind='tags' for account-wide tags or kind='segments' (with list_id) for per-list segments. | `egoi:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** ‚Äî you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{
  "api_key": "<value>"
}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "api_key": "<value>",
  "host": "https://api.egoiapp.com",
  "timeout": 60
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_key` | `string` | ‚úì | ‚úì | ‚Äî | E-goi API key. Created under My Account ‚Üí API Keys in the E-goi web UI. Sent in the 'Apikey' HTTP header. |
| `host` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `"https://api.egoiapp.com"` | API base URL (default: https://api.egoiapp.com). Override only when E-goi has provisioned a regional/dedicated host. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `60` | Per-request timeout in seconds (default: 60). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_EGOI__API_KEY` | `api_key` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | E-goi API key. Created under My Account ‚Üí API Keys in the E-goi web UI. Sent in the 'Apikey' HTTP header. |
| `TOOL_EGOI__HOST` | `host` | `string` | `"https://api.egoiapp.com"` | ‚Äî | API base URL (default: https://api.egoiapp.com). Override only when E-goi has provisioned a regional/dedicated host. |
| `TOOL_EGOI__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `60` | ‚Äî | Per-request timeout in seconds (default: 60). |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` ‚Äî useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `egoi_contact_manage`

- **`delete_one`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `list_id` | `integer` | ‚úì | ‚Äî |
  | `reason` | `string` | ‚úì | Human-readable justification recorded in the audit log. Required by the approval flow. |
  | `contact_id` | `‚Äî` | ‚Äî | Target id for *_one actions. Modern E-goi lists use a 10-char hex hash; legacy lists may still use an integer id. |
  | `contact_ids` | `array` | ‚Äî | Contact ids for bulk activate/deactivate/forget/delete_many/attach_tag/detach_tag. Each item is an integer or 10-char hex hash. |
  | `tag` | `‚Äî` | ‚Äî | Tag for attach_tag/detach_tag. Accepts the integer tag_id OR the tag name (case-insensitive). Names are resolved via GET /tags; an unknown name is rejected with a fuzzy suggestion. |
  | `tag_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | DEPRECATED ‚Äî use 'tag' (which also accepts names). Still honoured as a fallback for attach_tag/detach_tag. |
  | `contacts` | `array` | ‚Äî | Inline contact objects for action='import_json'. Each object should follow the E-goi shape: {'base': {...}, 'extra': {...}}. |
  | `file_id` | `string` | ‚Äî | GSageFile id of the CSV. Used by action='import_csv' and by attach_tag/detach_tag bulk mode. |
  | `email_column` | `string` | ‚Äî | CSV column that holds the email. Used by action='import_csv' and by attach_tag/detach_tag bulk mode (mutually exclusive with contact_id_column). |
  | `contact_id_column` | `string` | ‚Äî | CSV column with contact ids (int OR 10-char hex hash). Used by attach_tag/detach_tag bulk mode (mutually exclusive with email_column). |
  | `batch_size` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Contacts per attach_tag/detach_tag API call when running in bulk-CSV mode. |
  | `field_mapping` | `object` | ‚Äî | Map of CSV column -> E-goi field. Recognised base fields: email, first_name, last_name, cellphone, telephone, lang, birth_date, etc. Numeric strings are treated as extra-field ids. |
  | `mode` | `string` | ‚Äî | Bulk-import merge strategy. |
  | `compare_field` | `string` | ‚Äî | Field used to deduplicate bulk-import rows. |

  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `contact_ids` | `array` | ‚Äî | Contact ids for bulk activate/deactivate/forget/delete_many/attach_tag/detach_tag. Each item is an integer or 10-char hex hash. |
